block.comment: Welcome To Gvbvdxx's Script Maker, You Can Make Almost Anything With This!! Just Select A Category And Drag Out Blocks From It, Then Edit/Change The Text And Numbers, Then Click Run To Start Your Very Own Program!! You Can Save Your Work By Clicking The Save Button, And Just Remember The Name If You Don't Then You May Forget The Thing!! To Load You Can Click Load And Type The Name And Boom! There It Is But Just Delete Any Other Blocks Though, And Whats Great Is That You Can Use This Code In Your HTML Programs, Lets Not Go To Advanced... But You Can Share These By Clicking The Save Code, It Will Automatically Copy The Code For You, Then Select Where You Want To Add It, And Then Press Control And V To Paste Your Data, If You Want To Load Your Code, Select All Of The Code (Make it turn Blue) Then Copy It By Holding Control And V To Copy Then Click Load Code, Now Hold Control And V To Paste And Your Done!
